text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, I find Sweep Tosho reading a
textbook with unusual focus.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Mmm... So when the wind is... then the
object is...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Of course! I need to be smart if I'm gonna
be a great witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We learned about wind power in science class
today. You know, like how wind puts force on an
object, and... um, then it, uh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Anyways! The point is, I can run even faster if I
use the power of wind!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Let's whip up some wind and see how fast I can
get! Come on, let's get to the track!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Winning wind flower! Tailwind, blow forth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's surely by chance, but a gust of wind kicks up
just as she finishes chanting her spell.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yesss! I did it! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But this is no time to celebrate! I've gotta ride this
tailwind to go faster than ev—ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A particularly strong gust of wind blows away
Sweep Tosho's hat!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! Stop it, wind! I said stoooop!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But I gotta say, running with the wind at my
back feels even better than normal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to chasing her hat around, Sweep Tosho
seems to have grasped something that helps
improve her running!
